direct_sale.label: Direct sale
direct_sale.description: Product or service with immediate payment
direct_sale.runtime: Customer pays directly. Order is confirmed after payment.

request_sale.label: Sale on request
request_sale.description: Customer requests, you confirm and manage payment
request_sale.runtime: Customer sends a request. You review and confirm from the Orders page.

quote.label: Quote / On request
quote.description: Customer asks for info, price is defined later
quote.runtime: Customer asks for info without seeing a price. Manage the request from Orders and contact with a quote.
quote.hint_unit_price: Not required — price is on request

rental.label: Rental
rental.description: Customer requests a period, you verify availability
rental.runtime: Customer picks dates from catalog. Requests arrive in Orders where you can verify availability before confirming.
rental.post_save: When requests arrive, check dates in the Orders page and Calendar before confirming.
rental.hint_unit_price: Price per rental unit (day, hour, week)
rental.hint_rental_unit: How the rental period is measured
rental.setup_cue_unit: Set the rental unit (day, hour, week)

open_event.label: Open event
open_event.runtime: Customer purchases directly. After saving, open the product to add event dates and locations.
open_event.post_save: Add at least one event date from the "Event dates" section below.
open_event.hint_unit_price: Base ticket price (can be overridden per date)
open_event.setup_cue_dates: Add at least one event date
open_event.setup_cue_publish: Publish dates to make them visible in the catalog
open_event.no_occurrences_warning: No event dates — product is not yet bookable

capped_event.label: Limited capacity event
capped_event.description: Event with capacity, customer requests and you verify seats
capped_event.runtime: Customer requests seats. After saving, set dates and max capacity from the "Event dates" section. Requests arrive in Orders.
capped_event.post_save: Add event dates and set capacity for each from the section below.
capped_event.hint_unit_price: Base ticket price (can be overridden per date)
capped_event.setup_cue_dates: Add event dates with max capacity
capped_event.setup_cue_capacity: Set capacity on each event date
capped_event.setup_cue_publish: Publish dates to make them visible in the catalog
capped_event.no_occurrences_warning: No event dates — product is not yet bookable

issue.direct_inquiry: Direct mode not compatible with on-request pricing
issue.event_unpublished: Event not published — not visible in catalog

storefront.request_desc: This is an order request. You will receive confirmation before finalization.
storefront.direct_desc: Your order will be processed quickly. You will be contacted for details.
storefront.approval_desc: This request will be verified. You will receive availability confirmation.
storefront.rental_desc: Rental availability will be verified. You will receive confirmation.

ai_products.title: Generate products with AI
ai_products.desc: Describe what you sell or offer and we will generate suggestions for your catalog.
ai_products.placeholder: E.g.: Artisan bakery with fresh bread, pastries, tasting boxes and home delivery...
ai_products.manual_hint: You can also add products manually

occurrence_section.title: Event dates
occurrence_section.subtitle: Manage dates and locations for this event
occurrence_section.empty: No occurrences. Add dates for this event.
occurrence_section.info_create_first: After creating the product, you can add dates (occurrences) from the edit view.
